examples: The same minerals that occur in refractory inclusions are believed to be the earliest-formed substances to have condensed out of the solar nebula.
Equally perplexing constituents of Allende are the refractory inclusions: irregular white masses that tend to be larger than chondrules.
Because they are not metabolised, these molecules are referred to as "refractory".
The reason this matters is that 95% of dissolved organic matter seems to be refractory.
Instead, Dr Jiao thinks refractory compounds are made and released by these bugs mainly in response to viral infections.
